examples: The template for Adair's novel is not somebody else's fiction, but fact.
If you need to write a lot of similar letters, set up a template on your computer.
I have an Excel template for a week of breakfast, lunch and dinner.
Jeroen Dijsselbloem, the head of the Eurogroup, spooked the markets by implying the Cyprus bailout was the template.
God how I hope The Smurfs 2 ends up following the same template this August.
